executable.title: ResampleImage
executable.description: Resamples a moving NRRD image into the physical space of a reference NRRD image using ITK ResampleImageFilter. Output shares the spacing, origin, direction, and size of the reference image so that registration metrics have full pixel overlap.

parameters.label: Input/Output
parameters.description: Input images and output file path

image.name: inputImageFile
image.label: Input Image
image.description: Path to the input NRRD image to be resampled (the moving image).

image.name: referenceImageFile
image.label: Reference Image
image.description: Path to the reference NRRD image whose spacing, origin, direction, and size define the output grid.

image.name: outputImageFile
image.label: Output Image
image.description: Path to the resampled output NRRD image in reference image space.

double.name: defaultPixelValue
double.label: Default Pixel Value
double.description: Pixel value used for voxels that map outside the input image boundary.
